data.title: 13 Press Releases You Need to See This Week
data.description: In recent news, Lily's GLP-1 pill has received FDA approval, marking a significant milestone for the company. The March employment report revealed promising figures, with X number of jobs added to the market. KitchenAid has unveiled its latest innovation, a new mixer aimed at revolutionizing the cooking experience. Additionally, United Airlines has introduced a new TSA wait time tracker, aiming to enhance passenger experience. As Easter approaches, timely updates from the holiday season are surfacing. Moreover, the New York International Auto Show has also made headlines, showcasing the latest trends in the automotive industry.

The Secretary-General of the Gulf Cooperation Council and the Secretary-General of the United Nations discuss the Iranian attacks on Gulf countries and affirm the necessity of immediately halting all hostile actions.

data.title: South Korean brokerage looks to acquire stake in Coinone amid talks of 20% cap on major crypto exchange shareholders.
data.description: News sources have revealed that discussions about an acquisition are underway amidst South Korea's contemplation of implementing a cap of 20% on significant cryptocurrency exchange stakeholders. This proposal may lead major platforms to reorganize their ownership structures.
